title: [Non-record] Eval-time Adaptation: Stride-OGD + Two-Pass + NTK-RoPE
author: kellyvv

data.description: Stride-OGD: online gradient descent on a 1024-dimensional vocab bias vector updated every stride using exact gradients without backpropagation.
NTK-RoPE rescaling to evaluate at 4x longer context length without retraining.

novel_contributions: Stride-OGD: exact-gradient online adaptation of a vocab-sized bias vector with zero artifact cost
Two-pass evaluation that first collects per-token gradients and then re-scores with accumulated bias correction
NTK-RoPE context extension to 4096 tokens without retraining
Evaluation-time adaptation techniques that use the validation set as an implicit training signal
